hall_of_fame.title: support searching across multiple lines
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: The regex-automata 0.4 crate finally makes bounded multi-line search viable without catastrophic backtracking.

hall_of_fame.title: Support multiple windows
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: Multiple windows in Alacritty would improve user experience for those using window managers instead of tmux.

hall_of_fame.title: Support for GitHub Enterprise
hall_of_fame.one_line_why: With recent API advancements and client libraries, implementing GitHub Enterprise support now offers significant benefits to a large user base.

last_resurrection.title: [Feature Request] : Support for Würstchen
last_resurrection.one_line_why: With Würstchen's performance and the recent updates to the diffusers library, integrating Würstchen into ComfyUI can significantly enhance user workflow.
